I hereby claim:

  * I am an admin of http://leeszuba.com
  * I am laszuba (https://keybase.io/laszuba) on keybase.
  * I have a public key with fingerprint 3E85 1515 F443 5778 7237  B874 2D51 1107 8011 A836

To do so, I am signing this object:

{
    "body": {
        "key": {
            "fingerprint": "3e851515f44357787237b8742d5111078011a836",
            "host": "keybase.io",
            "key_id": "2d5111078011a836",
            "kid": "0101167847e586dc5c7017ad61f0253dac965f042851c4acd935d55bee34a499486e0a",

            "username": "laszuba"

            "hostname": "leeszuba.com",
            "protocol": "http:"

        "type": "web_service_binding",
        "version": 1
    },
    "ctime": 1426902838,
    "expire_in": 157680000,
    "prev": "c504b7681776dac1d26742478a257441bcedb4b6a3d677fdc07223b1991907c9",
    "seqno": 3,
    "tag": "signature"
}

which yields the signature:
